series_metadata.series_description: File contains the assessment sheet, the current assessed valuation sheet and related information. Assesments are invoices sent to fire departments, for funding the Dependent Fund.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operating area for one year then microfilm. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy hard copy. ; Microform: Retain diazo copy in operating area. Retain master microfilm in off site storage until record series is no longer created, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred
